posts.author: siva
posts.text: Equity intraday margin for Prop trades — Yes, for all trades.

posts.author: tradernoob
posts.text: Equity intraday margin for Prop trades — I know that a trading member is supposed to collect 20% upfront margin from clients for equity positions at NSE, but what about their own prop positions? Is 20% margin still applicable on those positions too?
